message.content:
## 작업 목표
ICE(PE) 사양 통풍(벤트/블로워) CAN 신호가 5초 후 꺼지는 문제의 원인을 찾아야 합니다.

## 배경
- CAN ID 0x49B (BDC_FD_14_500ms, CAN FD 32byte, 500ms 주기)로 통풍 명령을 보내고 있음
- IGN ON (0x3D1) 신호를 같이 보내면 통풍이 안 꺼지는 것을 확인함
- DBC에 CRC/AlvCnt가 정의되어 있지만, 다른 신호(0x3D1 IGN, 0x3DB 레스트모드)도 CRC/AlvCnt 없이 고정값으로 보내는데 정상 동작함
- 따라서 CRC/AlvCnt 문제는 아닌 것으로 판단

## 현재 코드에서 보내는 신호
RL VENT ON (0x49B, 500ms 주기, 32byte):
```
FF FF 00 00 00 00 00 05  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 10  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
```
- Byte 7: 0x05 (SHV_RLSeatHeatVentCmd, bit56, 4bit = 풍량 5단)
- Byte 15: 0x10 (SHV_Enable, bit124 = 1)

RR VENT ON (0x49B, 500ms 주기, 32byte):
```
FF FF 00 00 00 00 00 00  00 05 00 00 00 00 00 10  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
```
- Byte 9: 0x05 (SHV_RRSeatHeatVentCmd, bit72, 4bit = 풍량 5단)
- Byte 15: 0x10 (SHV_Enable, bit124 = 1)

## IGN ON 신호 (0x3D1, 200ms 주기, 32byte):
```
FF FF 00 55 00 00 00 00  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
```
- Byte 3: 0x55 (BCM_Ign1InSta=1, BCM_Ign2InSta=1)

## 확인할 사항
"C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_gn7\can pe 자료\" 폴더의 모든 자료를 분석해서:

1. **0x49B 메시지에서 통풍 외에 추가로 설정해야 하는 신호가 있는지 확인**
   - SHV_*IndCmd (인디케이터 커맨드) 시그널들이 0으로 보내지고 있는데, 이것들도 값을 넣어야 하는지
   - 특히 SHV_RLSeatHeatVentIndCmd (bit60), SHV_RRSeatHeatVentIndCmd (bit76) 등
   
2. **통풍 동작에 필요한 다른 CAN 메시지가 있는지 확인**
   - 예: 공조 관련 메시지, FATC 관련, 기타 조건부 신호
   - NM (Network Management) 메시지가 필요한지
   
3. **DBC에서 RPSU/SAU가 수신하는 통풍 관련 메시지 전체 목록**

4. **PPT 제작참고서에 통풍 검사 관련 내용이 있는지** (특히 "GN7 PE_시트 작동검사기_제작참고서_R2.0_250917(보안해제).pptx")

5. **Word/Excel 문서에 통풍 제어 조건이나 전제 조건이 명시되어 있는지**

6. **0x49B와 0x3D1(IGN)의 관계** — 왜 IGN이 있어야 통풍이 유지되는지에 대한 단서

모든 DBC, PPT, Word, Excel 파일을 꼼꼼히 읽어서 분석해주세요. 한글로 결과를 정리해주세요.

powershell -Command '
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
$docxPath = "C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_gn7\can pe 자료\Microsoft_Word_Document.docx"
$zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead($docxPath)
$entry = $zip.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -eq "word/document.xml" }
$stream = $entry.Open()
$reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader($stream)
$xml = [xml]$reader.ReadToEnd()
$reader.Close()
$zip.Dispose()
$ns = @{w="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main"}
$paragraphs = $xml.SelectNodes("//w:p", (New-Object System.Xml.XmlNamespaceManager($xml.NameTable)))
$nsMgr = New-Object System.Xml.XmlNamespaceManager($xml.NameTable)
$nsMgr.AddNamespace("w", "http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main")
$texts = @()
foreach ($p in $xml.SelectNodes("//w:p", $nsMgr)) {
    $t = ""
    foreach ($r in $p.SelectNodes(".//w:t", $nsMgr)) {
        $t += $r.InnerText
    }
    if ($t.Trim()) { $texts += $t }
}
$texts -join "`n"
' 2>&1 | head -200

content.text: Word 문서들은 주로 진단 서비스(UDS) 관련 문서입니다. 이제 PPT와 Excel을 확인하겠습니다.

input.command:
powershell -Command '
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
$pptxPath = "C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_gn7\can pe 자료\GN7 PE_시트 작동검사기_제작참고서_R2.0_250917(보안해제).pptx"
$zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead($pptxPath)
$slides = $zip.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -match "ppt/slides/slide\d+\.xml$" } | Sort-Object { [int]($_.Name -replace "slide|\.xml","") }
Write-Output "Total slides: $($slides.Count)"
foreach ($slide in $slides) {
    $stream = $slide.Open()
    $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader($stream)
    $content = $reader.ReadToEnd()
    $reader.Close()
    $xml = [xml]$content
    $texts = @()
    foreach ($node in $xml.SelectNodes("//*[local-name()=''t'']")) {
        if ($node.InnerText.Trim()) { $texts += $node.InnerText.Trim() }
    }
    $slideText = $texts -join " | "
    if ($slideText.Length -gt 500) { $slideText = $slideText.Substring(0, 500) + "..." }
    Write-Output "--- $($slide.Name) ---"
    Write-Output $slideText
    Write-Output ""
}
$zip.Dispose()
' 2>&1 | head -300

    11→Public Class FrmCanIce

    50→        If txtLog.TextLength > 50000 Then

   127→    ' ===== UDS 응답 처리 =====
   128→
   129→    Private Sub OnUdsCompleted(ByVal respId As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte())
   130→        If data Is Nothing OrElse data.Length = 0 Then Return
   131→
   132→        Dim hex As String = String.Join(" ", data.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2")))
   133→        Dim ecuName As String = GetEcuName(respId)
   134→
   135→        If data(0) = &H62 AndAlso data.Length >= 4 Then
   136→            ' RDBI 긍정 응답
   137→            Dim did As String = data(1).ToString("X2") & data(2).ToString("X2")
   138→            Dim payload = data.Skip(3).ToArray()
   139→            Dim ascii As Boolean = payload.All(Function(b) b >= &H20 AndAlso b <= &H7E)
   140→            Dim val As String = If(ascii, System.Text.Encoding.ASCII.GetString(payload),
   141→                                  String.Join(" ", payload.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2"))))
   142→            AppendResult("[RDBI] " & ecuName & " DID=" & did & " → " & val)
   143→
   144→        ElseIf data(0) = &H71 AndAlso data.Length >= 4 Then
   145→            ' Routine Control 긍정 응답 — 리미트/학습 결과 상세 파싱
   146→            Dim routineId As String = data(2).ToString("X2") & data(3).ToString("X2")
   147→            Dim subFunc As Byte = data(1) ' 01=Start, 03=RequestResults
   148→
   149→            If routineId = "12A6" OrElse routineId = "12A7" Then
   150→                Dim side As String = If(routineId = "12A6", "LH", "RH")
   151→                If subFunc = &H1 Then
   152→                    ' Start 응답 (EDU 세팅 또는 학습체크 요청)
   153→                    AppendResult($"[Routine] {ecuName} {side} 리미트 Start 수락 (RoutineID={routineId})")
   154→                ElseIf subFunc = &H3 AndAlso data.Length >= 5 Then
   155→                    ' RequestResults 응답 (학습 결과)
   156→                    Dim result As String = If(data(4) = &H2, "OK (학습완료)", If(data(4) = &H1, "NG (미학습)", $"결과=0x{data(4):X2}"))
   157→                    AppendResult($"★ [{side} 학습체크] {ecuName} → {result}")
   158→                Else
   159→                    AppendResult($"[Routine] {ecuName} {side} → {hex}")
   160→                End If
   161→            ElseIf routineId = "FF00" Then
   162→                ' 리미트 클리어 응답
   163→                AppendResult($"★ [리미트 클리어] {ecuName} → OK (RoutineID=FF00)")
   164→            Else
   165→                AppendResult("[Routine] " & ecuName & " RoutineID=" & routineId & " → " & hex)
   166→            End If
   167→
   168→        ElseIf data(0) = &H6F AndAlso data.Length >= 3 Then
   169→            ' IOControl 긍정 응답
   170→            Dim did As String = data(1).ToString("X2") & data(2).ToString("X2")
   171→            Dim ctrl As String = If(data.Length >= 4 AndAlso data(3) = &H3, "동작중", "정지")
   172→            AppendResult($"[RX] IOControl 응답 ← {ecuName} DID={did} {ctrl}")
   173→
   174→        ElseIf data(0) = &H7F AndAlso data.Length >= 3 Then
   175→            ' NRC
   176→            Dim nrcSid As String = data(1).ToString("X2")
   177→            Dim nrcCode As String = data(2).ToString("X2")
   178→            Dim nrcMsg As String = If(data(2) = &H78, "(처리중...대기)", "")
   179→            AppendResult($"[NRC] {ecuName} SID=0x{nrcSid} NRC=0x{nrcCode} {nrcMsg}")
   180→
   181→        ElseIf data(0) = &H54 Then
   182→            ' ClearDTC 긍정 응답
   183→            AppendResult("[ClearDTC] " & ecuName & " OK")
   184→
   185→        ElseIf data(0) = &H50 Then
   186→            ' Session 긍정 응답
   187→            AppendResult("[Session] " & ecuName & " OK")

   368→    ' =========================================================
   369→    '  레스트 모드 (CAN FD 0x3DB, 32byte, 200ms 주기)
   370→    '  PSeat_RLAutoPlayCmd_New: bit 144 (byte[18] bit 0-5)
   371→    '  PSeat_RRAutoPlayCmd_New: bit 150 (byte[18] bit 6 ~ byte[19] bit 3)
   372→    '  Value: 0x00=Off, 0x01=Relax, 0x02=Return
   373→    ' =========================================================
   374→
   375→    ''' <summary>0x3DB 레스트 모드 32byte 데이터 생성</summary>
   376→    Private Function BuildRestData(ByVal rlValue As Byte, ByVal rrValue As Byte) As Byte()
   377→        Dim data(31) As Byte
   378→        ' RL (bit 144-149): byte[18] bits 0-5
   379→        ' RR (bit 150-155): byte[18] bits 6-7 + byte[19] bits 0-3
   380→        data(18) = CByte((rlValue And &H3F) Or ((rrValue And &H3) << 6))
   381→        data(19) = CByte((rrValue >> 2) And &HF)
   382→        Return data
   383→    End Function
   384→
   385→    Private Sub SendRestMode(ByVal jobName As String, ByVal rlVal As Byte, ByVal rrVal As Byte, ByVal logMsg As String)
   386→        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
   387→        AppendLog(logMsg)
   388→        ' 기존 레스트 Job 제거 후 새로 등록
   389→        _can.RemoveJob("REST_MODE")
   390→        Dim d = BuildRestData(rlVal, rrVal)
   391→        _can.AddJob32("REST_MODE", &H3DB, 200,
   392→                      d(0), d(1), d(2), d(3), d(4), d(5), d(6), d(7),
   393→                      d(8), d(9), d(10), d(11), d(12), d(13), d(14), d(15),
   394→                      d(16), d(17), d(18), d(19), d(20), d(21), d(22), d(23),
   395→                      d(24), d(25), d(26), d(27), d(28), d(29), d(30), d(31))
   396→        AppendResult("[REST] " & logMsg & " → byte[18]=0x" & d(18).ToString("X2") & " byte[19]=0x" & d(19).ToString("X2"))
   397→    End Sub

   141→    Public Sub StartPolling(ByVal idleSleepMs As Integer)
   142→        StopPolling()
   143→        _pollCts = New CancellationTokenSource()
   144→        Dim token = _pollCts.Token
   145→
   146→        If _isFd Then
   147→            ' FD 모드 폴링
   148→            ThreadPool.QueueUserWorkItem(Sub()
   149→                                             Dim msg As TPCANMsgFD
   150→                                             Dim ts As ULong
   151→                                             While Not token.IsCancellationRequested
   152→                                                 Dim st = PCANBasic.ReadFD(_handle, msg, ts)
   153→                                                 If st <> TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_QRCVEMPTY Then
   154→                                                     If LogAllRawRxFrames Then
   155→                                                         RaiseEvent Log(BuildLogLineFD("RX", msg, ts))
   156→                                                     End If
   157→                                                     Dim len = DlctoLen(msg.DLC)
   158→                                                     Dim data As Byte() = New Byte(len - 1) {}
   159→                                                     If len > 0 Then Array.Copy(msg.DATA, data, len)
   160→                                                     ProcessCanMsg(msg.ID, data)
   161→                                                 ElseIf st = TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_QRCVEMPTY Then
   162→                                                     If idleSleepMs > 0 Then Thread.Sleep(idleSleepMs)
   163→                                                 Else
   164→                                                     RaiseEvent [Error](st)
   165→                                                     Thread.Sleep(10)
   166→                                                 End If
   167→                                             End While
   168→                                         End Sub)
   169→        Else
   170→            ' 표준 CAN 2.0 폴링
   171→            ThreadPool.QueueUserWorkItem(Sub()
   172→                                             Dim msg As TPCANMsg
   173→                                             Dim ts As TPCANTimestamp
   174→                                             While Not token.IsCancellationRequested
   175→                                                 Dim st = PCANBasic.Read(_handle, msg, ts)
   176→                                                 If st = TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK Then
   177→                                                     If LogAllRawRxFrames Then
   178→                                                         RaiseEvent Log(BuildLogLineStd("RX", msg))
   179→                                                     End If
   180→                                                     Dim len As Integer = msg.LEN
   181→                                                     Dim data As Byte() = New Byte(len - 1) {}
   182→                                                     If len > 0 Then Array.Copy(msg.DATA, data, len)
   183→                                                     ProcessCanMsg(msg.ID, data)
   184→                                                 ElseIf st = TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_QRCVEMPTY Then
   185→                                                     If idleSleepMs > 0 Then Thread.Sleep(idleSleepMs)
   186→                                                 Else
   187→                                                     RaiseEvent [Error](st)
   188→                                                     Thread.Sleep(10)
   189→                                                 End If
   190→                                             End While
   191→                                         End Sub)
   192→        End If
   193→
   194→        RaiseEvent Log("Polling started.")
   195→    End Sub

   331→    Private Function HexToBytes(ByVal hex As String) As Byte()
   332→        If hex Is Nothing Then Return Nothing
   333→
   334→        Dim cleaned As String = hex.Replace(" ", "") _
   335→                                   .Replace(vbTab, "") _
   336→                                   .Replace(vbCr, "") _
   337→                                   .Replace(vbLf, "")
   338→
   339→        If cleaned.Length = 0 Then
   340→            Return New Byte() {}
   341→        End If
   342→
   343→        If (cleaned.Length Mod 2) <> 0 Then
   344→            Throw New ArgumentException("hexData length must be even.", "hex")
   345→        End If
   346→
   347→        Dim len As Integer = cleaned.Length \ 2
   348→        Dim data(len - 1) As Byte
   349→
   350→        Dim i As Integer
   351→        For i = 0 To len - 1
   352→            data(i) = Byte.Parse(cleaned.Substring(i * 2, 2), NumberStyles.HexNumber)
   353→        Next
   354→
   355→        Return data
   356→    End Function

   391→    Private Sub Sched_Elapsed(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As ElapsedEventArgs)
   392→        Dim ms As Long = If(_sw IsNot Nothing, _sw.ElapsedMilliseconds, Environment.TickCount)
   393→
   394→        ' ISO-TP 타임아웃 처리
   395→        IsoTpPump(ms)
   396→
   397→        Dim snapshot As List(Of TxJob)
   398→        SyncLock _jobs
   399→            snapshot = New List(Of TxJob)(_jobs)
   400→        End SyncLock
   401→
   402→        Dim i As Integer
   403→        For i = 0 To snapshot.Count - 1
   404→            Dim job As TxJob = snapshot(i)
   405→
   406→            If job.PeriodMs = 0 OrElse ms - job.LastTick >= job.PeriodMs Then
   407→
   408→                ' ===== Alive Counter 적용 =====
   409→                If job.AliveIndex >= 0 AndAlso job.Data IsNot Nothing AndAlso job.AliveIndex < job.Data.Length Then
   410→                    Dim b As Byte = job.Data(job.AliveIndex)
   411→
   412→                    If job.AliveHighNibble Then
   413→                        b = CByte(((job.AliveValue And &HF) << 4) Or (b And &HF))
   414→                    Else
   415→                        b = CByte((b And &HF0) Or (job.AliveValue And &HF))
   416→                    End If
   417→
   418→                    job.Data(job.AliveIndex) = b
   419→                    job.AliveValue = CByte((job.AliveValue + 1) And &HF)
   420→                End If
   421→                ' ===== Alive 끝 =====
   422→
   423→                ' ===== AUTOSAR E2E P02 CRC 갱신 =====
   424→                If job.E2eEnabled AndAlso job.Data IsNot Nothing AndAlso job.Data.Length >= 2 Then
   425→                    Dim cntIndex As Integer = If(job.AliveIndex >= 0, job.AliveIndex, 1)
   426→
   427→                    If cntIndex >= 0 AndAlso cntIndex < job.Data.Length Then
   428→                        Dim cnt As Integer = job.Data(cntIndex) And &HF
   429→                        Dim dataId As Byte = job.E2eDataIdList(cnt And &HF)
   430→
   431→                        Dim crc As Byte = Crc8H2F_Calc(job.Data, 1, job.Data.Length - 1, dataId)
   432→                        job.Data(0) = crc
   433→                    End If
   434→                End If
   435→                ' ===== E2E CRC 끝 =====
   436→
   437→                ' FD/Standard 분기
   438→                If _isFd Then
   439→                    WriteFD(job.Id, job.Data, job.Brs, job.IsExt)
   440→                Else
   441→                    WriteStd(job.Id, job.Data)
   442→                End If
   443→                job.LastTick = ms
   444→
   445→                If job.OneShot Then
   446→                    RemoveJob(job.Name)
   447→                Else
   448→                    SyncLock _jobs
   449→                        Dim j As Integer
   450→                        For j = 0 To _jobs.Count - 1
   451→                            If _jobs(j).Name = job.Name Then
   452→                                Dim t As TxJob = _jobs(j)
   453→                                t.LastTick = job.LastTick
   454→                                t.AliveValue = job.AliveValue
   455→                                _jobs(j) = t
   456→                                Exit For
   457→                            End If
   458→                        Next
   459→                    End SyncLock
   460→                End If
   461→            End If
   462→        Next
   463→    End Sub

   465→    ' ===== UDS/ISO-TP (8-byte 배열 기반) =====
   466→    Private Sub OnCanRx_Uds(ByVal canId As UInteger, ByVal dlc8 As Byte())
   467→        If dlc8 Is Nothing OrElse dlc8.Length < 2 Then Return
   468→
   469→        Dim pciType As Integer = (dlc8(0) >> 4) And &HF
   470→        Select Case pciType
   471→            Case &H0 ' SF
   472→                Dim len As Integer = dlc8(0) And &HF
   473→                If len <= 0 OrElse len > 7 Then Return
   474→                Dim uds As Byte() = New Byte(len - 1) {}
   475→                Buffer.BlockCopy(dlc8, 1, uds, 0, len)
   476→                OnUdsComplete(canId, uds)
   477→
   478→            Case &H1 ' FF
   479→                Dim totalLen As Integer = ((dlc8(0) And &HF) << 8) Or dlc8(1)
   480→                Dim part = dlc8.Skip(2).ToArray()
   481→
   482→                _isotp.Active = True
   483→                _isotp.RespId = canId
   484→                _isotp.ReqId = canId - &H8
   485→                _isotp.Expected = totalLen
   486→                _isotp.Got = part.Length
   487→                _isotp.NextSn = 1
   488→                _isotp.Buf = If(_isotp.Buf, New List(Of Byte)())
   489→                _isotp.Buf.Clear()
   490→                _isotp.Buf.AddRange(part.Take(Math.Min(part.Length, totalLen)))
   491→                _isotp.LastActivityMs = If(_sw IsNot Nothing, _sw.ElapsedMilliseconds, Environment.TickCount)
   492→
   493→                SendFlowControlCts(_isotp.ReqId)
   494→
   495→            Case &H2 ' CF
   496→                If Not _isotp.Active OrElse canId <> _isotp.RespId Then Return
   497→
   498→                Dim sn As Byte = CByte(dlc8(0) And &HF)
   499→                If sn <> _isotp.NextSn Then
   500→                    If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[ISO-TP] SN mismatch exp=" & _isotp.NextSn & ", got=" & sn & " → abort")
   501→                    _isotp.Active = False
   502→                    Exit Select
   503→                End If
   504→                _isotp.NextSn = CByte((_isotp.NextSn Mod &HF) + 1)
   505→
   506→                Dim chunk = dlc8.Skip(1).ToArray()
   507→                Dim remain As Integer = _isotp.Expected - _isotp.Got
   508→                Dim take As Integer = Math.Min(remain, chunk.Length)
   509→                _isotp.Buf.AddRange(chunk.Take(take))
   510→                _isotp.Got += take
   511→                _isotp.LastActivityMs = If(_sw IsNot Nothing, _sw.ElapsedMilliseconds, Environment.TickCount)
   512→
   513→                If _isotp.Got >= _isotp.Expected Then
   514→                    Dim uds = _isotp.Buf.Take(_isotp.Expected).ToArray()
   515→                    _isotp.Active = False
   516→                    OnUdsComplete(canId, uds)
   517→                End If
   518→
   519→            Case &H3 ' FC
   520→            Case Else
   521→        End Select
   522→    End Sub
   523→
   524→    Private Sub SendFlowControlCts(ByVal reqId As UInteger)
   525→        WriteCanMsg(ToIdHex(reqId), {"30", "00", "00", "00", "00", "00", "00", "00"})
   526→        RaiseEvent Log("[ISO-TP] FC(CTS) sent to " & ToIdHex(reqId))
   527→    End Sub
   528→
   529→    Private Sub IsoTpPump(ByVal nowMs As Long)
   530→        If _isotp.Active AndAlso (nowMs - _isotp.LastActivityMs) > _isotp.TimeoutMs Then
   531→            If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[ISO-TP] Timeout → abort")
   532→            _isotp.Active = False
   533→        End If
   534→    End Sub

   536→    Private Sub OnUdsComplete(ByVal respId As UInteger, ByVal uds As Byte())
   537→        RaiseEvent UdsCompleted(respId, uds)
   538→
   539→        If ShouldFilterUds(uds) Then
   540→            Return
   541→        End If
   542→
   543→        If LogVerboseInternalState Then
   544→            If uds.Length >= 3 AndAlso uds(0) = &H62 Then
   545→                Dim did As String = "F1" & uds(2).ToString("X2")
   546→                Dim payload = uds.Skip(3).ToArray()
   547→                Dim ascii As Boolean = payload.All(Function(b) b >= &H20 AndAlso b <= &H7E)
   548→                Dim val As String = If(ascii, Encoding.ASCII.GetString(payload), String.Join(" ", payload.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2"))))
   549→                RaiseEvent Log("[RDBI] DID " & did & " = " & val)
   550→            ElseIf uds.Length >= 3 AndAlso uds(0) = &H7F Then
   551→                RaiseEvent Log("[NRC] SID=0x" & uds(1).ToString("X2") & ", NRC=0x" & uds(2).ToString("X2"))
   552→            Else
   553→                RaiseEvent Log("[UDS] " & String.Join(" ", uds.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2"))))
   554→            End If
   555→        End If
   556→    End Sub

   558→    Private Shared Function ToIdHex(ByVal id As UInteger) As String
   559→        Return "0x" & id.ToString("X3")
   560→    End Function
   561→
   562→    Private Shared Function ShouldFilterUds(ByVal uds As Byte()) As Boolean
   563→        If uds Is Nothing OrElse uds.Length = 0 Then Return False
   564→        If uds(0) = &H7E Then Return True
   565→        Return False
   566→    End Function

   568→    ' ===== 간단 UDS SF 추출 =====
   569→    Private Shared Function TryExtractUdsPayload(ByVal dlc8 As Byte(), ByRef uds As Byte()) As Boolean
   570→        uds = Nothing
   571→        If dlc8 Is Nothing OrElse dlc8.Length < 2 Then Return False
   572→
   573→        Dim pciType As Integer = (dlc8(0) >> 4) And &HF
   574→        If pciType = &H0 Then
   575→            Dim len As Integer = dlc8(0) And &HF
   576→            If len <= 0 OrElse len > dlc8.Length - 1 Then Return False
   577→            uds = New Byte(len - 1) {}
   578→            Buffer.BlockCopy(dlc8, 1, uds, 0, len)
   579→            Return True
   580→        End If
   581→        Return False
   582→    End Function
   583→
   584→    Private Sub LogRDBIResponseFromCan(ByVal canData As Byte())
   585→        Dim uds As Byte() = Nothing
   586→        If Not TryExtractUdsPayload(canData, uds) Then Return
   587→        If uds.Length < 3 OrElse uds(0) <> &H62 Then Return
   588→
   589→        Dim did As String = "F1" & uds(2).ToString("X2")
   590→        Dim payload = uds.Skip(3).ToArray()
   591→        Dim ascii As Boolean = payload.All(Function(b) b >= &H20 AndAlso b <= &H7E)
   592→        Dim val As String = If(ascii, Encoding.ASCII.GetString(payload), String.Join(" ", payload.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2"))))
   593→        If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[RDBI] DID " & did & " = " & val)
   594→    End Sub

   596→    ' ===== 3C3 LimitSet FSM =====
   597→    Private Shared ReadOnly StaMap As String() = {"0", "1", "2", "3", "4", "5", "6", "7"}
   598→
   599→    Private Shared Function IsBusy(ByVal code As UInteger) As Boolean
   600→        Return Not (code = 0 OrElse code = 4)
   601→    End Function
   602→
   603→    Private Class LimitSetSession
   604→        Public Axis As String
   605→        Public Active As Boolean
   606→        Public LastCode As UInteger
   607→        Public StartedAt As DateTime
   608→        Public LastChangeAt As DateTime
   609→        Public Toggles As Integer
   610→        Public FramesSinceStable As Integer
   611→    End Class
   612→
   613→    Private _tiltSess As New LimitSetSession With {.Axis = "Tilt"}
   614→    Private _hgtSess As New LimitSetSession With {.Axis = "Height"}
   615→
   616→    Private Sub Handle_3C3_LimitSetFSM(ByVal d As Byte())
   617→        Dim tiltSta As UInteger = ReadMotorola(d, 132, 3)
   618→        Dim hgtSta As UInteger = ReadMotorola(d, 138, 3)
   619→
   620→        UpdateLimitSet(_tiltSess, tiltSta)
   621→        UpdateLimitSet(_hgtSess, hgtSta)
   622→    End Sub
   623→
   624→    Private Sub UpdateLimitSet(ByVal s As LimitSetSession, ByVal code As UInteger)
   625→        If Not s.Active Then
   626→            If IsBusy(code) Then
   627→                s.Active = True
   628→                s.StartedAt = DateTime.Now
   629→                s.LastChangeAt = s.StartedAt
   630→                s.Toggles = 0
   631→                s.FramesSinceStable = 0
   632→                If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[" & s.Axis & "] Limit Set START (code=" & code & ", map=" & MapSta(code) & ")")
   633→            End If
   634→        Else
   635→            If code <> s.LastCode Then
   636→                s.LastChangeAt = DateTime.Now
   637→                If IsBusy(s.LastCode) <> IsBusy(code) Then s.Toggles += 1
   638→                If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[" & s.Axis & "] State CHG " & s.LastCode & "→" & code & " (map " & MapSta(s.LastCode) & "→" & MapSta(code) & ")")
   639→            End If
   640→
   641→            If Not IsBusy(code) Then
   642→                s.FramesSinceStable += 1
   643→                If s.FramesSinceStable >= 2 Then
   644→                    Dim dur = DateTime.Now - s.StartedAt
   645→                    If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[" & s.Axis & "] Limit Set DONE in " & dur.TotalSeconds.ToString("0.0") &
   646→                                                                  "s (toggles=" & s.Toggles & ", last=" & code & "/" & MapSta(code) & ")")
   647→                    s.Active = False
   648→                End If
   649→            Else
   650→                s.FramesSinceStable = 0
   651→            End If
   652→
   653→            Dim elapsed = DateTime.Now - s.StartedAt
   654→            If elapsed.TotalSeconds > 20 AndAlso s.Active Then
   655→                If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[" & s.Axis & "] Limit Set TIMEOUT (>20s) — last=" & code & "/" & MapSta(code))
   656→                s.Active = False
   657→            End If
   658→        End If
   659→        s.LastCode = code
   660→    End Sub

   662→    Private Shared Function ReadMotorola(ByVal d As Byte(), ByVal startBit As Integer, ByVal len As Integer) As UInteger
   663→        Dim v As UInteger = 0
   664→        If d Is Nothing Then Return 0
   665→        Dim i As Integer
   666→        For i = 0 To len - 1
   667→            Dim cur As Integer = startBit - i
   668→            Dim bi As Integer = cur \ 8
   669→            Dim biIn As Integer = 7 - (cur Mod 8)
   670→            If bi >= 0 AndAlso bi < d.Length Then
   671→                v = (v << 1) Or CUInt((d(bi) >> biIn) And 1)
   672→            End If
   673→        Next
   674→        Return v
   675→    End Function
   676→
   677→    Private Shared Function ReadSignalMotorola(ByVal data As Byte(), ByVal startBit As Integer, ByVal length As Integer) As UInteger
   678→        Dim value As UInteger = 0
   679→        Dim i As Integer
   680→        For i = 0 To length - 1
   681→            Dim curBit As Integer = startBit - i
   682→            Dim byteIndex As Integer = curBit \ 8
   683→            Dim bitIndexInByte As Integer = 7 - (curBit Mod 8)
   684→            If byteIndex < 0 OrElse byteIndex >= data.Length Then Continue For
   685→            Dim bit As Integer = (data(byteIndex) >> bitIndexInByte) And &H1
   686→            value = (value << 1) Or CUInt(bit)
   687→        Next
   688→        Return value
   689→    End Function

   692→        Return If(v < CUInt(StaMap.Length), StaMap(v), "UNK(" & v & ")")

   704→    Private _rclInit, _slideInit, _tiltInit, _relaxTiltInit, _heightInit, _cushExtInit, _legrestInit, _hrestInit, _hrestExtInit, _rlMonInit, _rrMonInit, _rlFtInit, _rrFtInit As UInteger?
   705→    Private _rclVrtlSet, _slideVrtlSet, _tiltVrtlSet, _rlxTiltVrtlSet, _heightVrtlSet, _cushExtVrtlSet, _legrestVrtlSet, _hrestVrtlSet, _hrestExtVSert, _rlMonVrtlSet, _rrMonVrtlSet As UInteger?
   706→
   707→    ' ===== FD 기반 ISO-TP (Raw FD 프레임) =====
   708→    Private Sub HandleIsoTp_Core(ByVal frame As TPCANMsgFD)
   709→        If frame.DATA Is Nothing OrElse frame.DATA.Length = 0 Then Return
   710→        Dim pci As Byte = frame.DATA(0)
   711→
   712→        If (pci And &HF0) = &H0 Then ' SF
   713→            Dim len As Integer = (pci And &HF)
   714→            If len < 0 Then len = 0
   715→            If len > 7 Then len = 7
   716→            Dim payload As Byte() = New Byte(len - 1) {}
   717→            Array.Copy(frame.DATA, 1, payload, 0, len)
   718→            RaiseEvent UdsCompleted(frame.ID, payload)
   719→            If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("UDS SF RX LEN=" & len)
   720→            _isotp = New IsoTpState()
   721→        ElseIf (pci And &HF0) = &H10 Then ' FF
   722→            Dim total As Integer = ((pci And &HF) << 8) Or frame.DATA(1)
   723→            _isotp.Active = True
   724→            _isotp.RespId = frame.ID
   725→            _isotp.ReqId = frame.ID - &H8
   726→            _isotp.Expected = total
   727→            _isotp.Buf = If(_isotp.Buf, New List(Of Byte)(total))
   728→            _isotp.Buf.Clear()
   729→
   730→            Dim copyLen As Integer = Math.Min(6, frame.DATA.Length - 2)
   731→            If copyLen > 0 Then _isotp.Buf.AddRange(frame.DATA.Skip(2).Take(copyLen))
   732→            _isotp.Got = copyLen
   733→            _isotp.NextSn = 1
   734→            _isotp.LastActivityMs = If(_sw IsNot Nothing, _sw.ElapsedMilliseconds, Environment.TickCount)
   735→
   736→            If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("UDS FF RX total=" & total & ", first=" & copyLen)
   737→            SendFlowControlCts(_isotp.ReqId)
   738→        ElseIf (pci And &HF0) = &H20 Then ' CF
   739→            If Not _isotp.Active OrElse frame.ID <> _isotp.RespId Then Return
   740→
   741→            Dim sn As Byte = CByte(pci And &HF)
   742→            If sn <> _isotp.NextSn Then
   743→                If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("UDS CF SN mismatch " & sn & "!=" & _isotp.NextSn)
   744→                _isotp.Active = False
   745→                Return
   746→            End If
   747→            _isotp.NextSn = CByte((_isotp.NextSn + 1) And &HF)
   748→
   749→            Dim take As Integer = Math.Min(7, frame.DATA.Length - 1)
   750→            If take > 0 Then _isotp.Buf.AddRange(frame.DATA.Skip(1).Take(take))
   751→            _isotp.Got += take
   752→            _isotp.LastActivityMs = If(_sw IsNot Nothing, _sw.ElapsedMilliseconds, Environment.TickCount)
   753→
   754→            If _isotp.Got >= _isotp.Expected Then
   755→                Dim pl = _isotp.Buf.Take(_isotp.Expected).ToArray()
   756→                RaiseEvent UdsCompleted(frame.ID, pl)
   757→                If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("UDS CF RX done len=" & pl.Length)
   758→                _isotp = New IsoTpState()
   759→            End If
   760→        ElseIf (pci And &HF0) = &H30 Then
   761→            If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("UDS FC RX")
   762→        End If
   763→    End Sub

   766→    Private Shared Function LengthToDlc(ByVal len As Integer) As Integer
   767→        If len <= 0 Then Return 0
   768→        If len <= 8 Then Return len
   769→        If len <= 12 Then Return 9

   778→    Private Shared Function DlctoLen(ByVal dlc As Integer) As Integer
   779→        If dlc <= 8 Then Return dlc
   780→        Select Case dlc
   781→            Case 9 : Return 12
   782→            Case 10 : Return 16
   783→            Case 11 : Return 20

   812→    Public Shared Function BytesToHex(ByVal data As Byte(), ByVal len As Integer) As String
   813→        If data Is Nothing OrElse len <= 0 Then Return ""
   814→        Dim n As Integer = Math.Min(len, data.Length)
   815→        Dim sb As New StringBuilder(n * 3)
   816→        Dim i As Integer
   817→        For i = 0 To n - 1
   818→            If i > 0 Then sb.Append(" ")
   819→            sb.Append(data(i).ToString("X2"))
   820→        Next

   824→    Private Shared Function ParseIdHex(ByVal idHex As String) As UInteger
   825→        If String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(idHex) Then Return 0

   827→        If idHex.StartsWith("0x", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) Then
   828→            idHex = idHex.Substring(2)

   830→        Dim v As UInteger = 0

   835→    Private Shared Function HexArray(ByVal hex As String()) As Byte()
   836→        If hex Is Nothing Then Return New Byte(-1) {}

   847→    ' ===== AUTOSAR E2E Profile 2 CRC8H2F =====
   848→    Private Shared Function Crc8H2F_Update(ByVal crc As Byte, ByVal dataByte As Byte) As Byte
   849→        Dim cur As Integer = crc Xor dataByte
   850→        Dim i As Integer
   851→        For i = 0 To 7
   852→            If (cur And &H80) <> 0 Then
   853→                cur = ((cur << 1) And &HFF) Xor &H2F
   854→            Else
   855→                cur = (cur << 1) And &HFF
   856→            End If
   857→        Next
   858→        Return CByte(cur And &HFF)
   859→    End Function
   860→
   861→    Private Shared Function Crc8H2F_Calc(ByVal data As Byte(),
   862→                                         ByVal offset As Integer,
   863→                                         ByVal count As Integer,
   864→                                         ByVal dataId As Byte) As Byte
   865→        Dim crc As Byte = &HFF
   866→
   867→        If data Is Nothing OrElse count <= 0 Then
   868→            Return 0
   869→        End If
   870→
   871→        Dim i As Integer
   872→        For i = 0 To count - 1
   873→            crc = Crc8H2F_Update(crc, data(offset + i))
   874→        Next
   875→
   876→        crc = Crc8H2F_Update(crc, dataId)
   877→        crc = CByte(crc Xor &HFF)
   878→        Return crc
   879→    End Function

이제 전체 분석 결과를 정리하겠습니다.

---

# GN7 PE 통풍(벤트) 5초 후 꺼지는 문제 분석 결과

## 1. 핵심 결론: NM(Network Management) 메시지 누락이 원인

제작참고서 5페이지에 명확히 기재됨:

**"CCU NM 메시지 송출 사양"** 항목에서 **NM_CGW_CCU (0x17FC0070)** 를 반드시 보내야 한다고 명시되어 있다. 이 NM 메시지가 없으면 SHVU가 수 초 내에 NM Sleep 상태로 전환되어 통풍이 꺼진다.

### NM_CGW_CCU 메시지 사양 (제작참고서 + DBC)
| 항목 | 값 |
|------|-----|
| CAN ID | 0x17FC0070 (Extended ID) |
| 길이 | 32 byte |
| 주기 | 100ms |
| 프로토콜 | CAN FD, Extended Frame |

### 보내야 할 시그널값 (제작참고서 5페이지)
| 시그널 | 값 | 설명 |
|--------|-----|------|
| SNI_CGW_CCU (bit 0-7) | 0x70 | Source Node ID |
| CBV_RMR_CGW_CCU (bit 8) | 0x0 | |
| CBV_NMCoID_CGW_CCU (bit 9-10) | 0x0 | |
| CBV_NMCoSRB_CGW_CCU (bit 11) | 0x0 | |
| CBV_AWB_CGW_CCU (bit 12) | 0x1 | Active Wakeup Bit |
| CBV_PNIB_CGW_CCU (bit 14) | 0x1 | PNI Bit |
| NRR_CGW_CCU (bit 16-23) | 0x0 | |
| NM_State_CGW_CCU (bit 24-31) | 0x4 | NM State (Normal Operation) |
| PNI_CGW_CCU (bit 32-63) | 0x0 | |
| PNI_CGW_CCU_1 (bit 64-127) | 0x0 | |
| PNI_CGW_CCU_2 (bit 128-191) | 0x2000000 | PNI (B2-CAN 제어기 ALL) |
| PNI_CGW_CCU_3 (bit 192-255) | 0x0 | |

### 왜 IGN ON (0x3D1)을 보내면 통풍이 유지되었는가

IGN 신호(BCM_Ign1InSta=1)를 받은 SHVU가 "차량 Awake 상태"로 판단하여 NM Sleep 전환을 지연시킨 것으로 보인다. 그러나 이것은 정상 동작 조건이 아니며, NM 메시지를 보내는 것이 정식 방법이다.

## 2. 0x49B 메시지에서 추가 설정이 필요한 시그널

### 현재 보내는 것 (RL VENT 예시)
- Byte 7 (bit 56-59): SHV_RLSeatHeatVentCmd = 0x5 (Vent High) -- **정상**
- Byte 15 (bit 124): SHV_Enable = 0x1 (On) -- **정상**
- Byte 0-1 (bit 0-15): CRC = 0xFFFF -- **고정값 (E2E 미적용)**
- 나머지 모두 0x00

### IndCmd 시그널에 대해
SHV_RLSeatHeatVentIndCmd (bit 60-63), SHV_RRSeatHeatVentIndCmd (bit 76-79) 등의 인디케이터 커맨드는 ATS_FD와 FCS_FD가 수신한다. **SHVU가 수신하는 시그널이 아니므로** 통풍 동작에는 영향 없다. 0으로 보내도 무방하다.

### 빠진 것이 있는지
제작참고서 8페이지에 통풍 동작에 필요한 시그널이 정확히 2가지로 명시됨:
1. **SHV_Enable = 0x1** (공통, 모든 SHVU 수신)
2. **SHV_*SeatHeatVentCmd** (좌석별 동작 명령)

현재 코드에서 이 2가지는 정확히 보내고 있다.

## 6. 해결 방안

### 즉시 추가해야 할 메시지 (우선순위순)

**1순위: NM_CGW_CCU (0x17FC0070)**
```
Extended CAN FD, 100ms 주기, 32byte
Byte[0] = 0x70        (SNI)
Byte[1] = 0x50        (CBV: AWB=1(bit4), PNIB=1(bit6))
Byte[2] = 0x00        (NRR)
Byte[3] = 0x04        (NM_State = Normal Operation)
Byte[4-7] = 0x00 0x00 0x00 0x00  (PNI)
Byte[8-15] = 0x00 ... (PNI_1)
Byte[16-23] = 0x00 0x00 0x02 0x00 0x00 0x00 0x00 0x00  (PNI_2 = 0x2000000)
Byte[24-31] = 0x00 ... (PNI_3)
```

**참고**: CBV_AWB는 bit 12 (byte[1] bit 4), CBV_PNIB는 bit 14 (byte[1] bit 6). 따라서 byte[1] = 0x50 (0b01010000 = bit4 + bit6). 정확한 비트 매핑은 Little-Endian(Intel byte order)이므로:
- Byte[0] = 0x70 (SNI_CGW_CCU: bit 0-7)
- Byte[1] bit 0 = CBV_RMR (=0), bit 1-2 = CBV_NMCoID (=0), bit 3 = CBV_NMCoSRB (=0), bit 4 = CBV_AWB (=1), bit 6 = CBV_PNIB (=1) => 0x50
- Byte[2] = 0x00 (NRR)
- Byte[3] = 0x04 (NM_State)

**PNI_CGW_CCU_2 (bit 128-191) = 0x2000000**:
- bit 128부터 시작, 64bit, Little-Endian
- 0x02000000 = byte[16]=0x00, byte[17]=0x00, byte[18]=0x00, byte[19]=0x02
  (실제로는 0x2000000 = 33554432 = bit 25 set, byte offset 128/8=16부터 => byte[19] bit 1 = 1 => byte[19]=0x02)

**2순위: CLU_01_20ms (0x1AA)** - 차속 0km/h
```
CAN FD, 20ms 주기
CLU_DisSpdVal_KPH (bit 64, 9bit) = 0
```

**3순위: EMS_02_10ms (0x100)** - 엔진 정지 상태
```
CAN FD, 10ms 주기
ENG_EngSta (bit 61, 3bit) = 0
```

NM 메시지가 가장 중요하다. NM이 없으면 AUTOSAR NM 사양에 의해 SHVU가 Sleep 모드로 전환되기 때문이다. IGN이 있을 때 통풍이 유지된 것은 IGN 신호가 SHVU의 NM Sleep을 억제하는 부차적 효과가 있었기 때문이지, 정상 동작 경로가 아니다.
